sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13846" key="a)posterhtri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποστερ-ητρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,fem.,<sense id="n13846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for cheating,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γνώμη</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg003.perseus-grc1:730" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">730</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
